# ScaleHaven Blog Calendar — 104 Posts (1 Year, 2x/Week)

Covers all clinic types ScaleHaven serves: med spas, dermatology clinics, aesthetic clinics, cosmetic clinics, skincare clinics, laser clinics, plastic surgery, and injectable specialists.

Publishing: **Tuesdays + Fridays at 9:00 AM ET** via GitHub Actions.
Queue location: `/blog/_queue/`
Filename format: `NNN-slug.html` (lowest number publishes next).

---

## Pillar Categories

1. **Med Spa Marketing** (20 posts) — broad authority for "med spa marketing" terms
2. **Lead Generation & Follow-Up** (15 posts) — bottom-funnel conversion topics
3. **Meta / Facebook / Instagram Ads** (12 posts) — paid social authority
4. **Dermatology & Cosmetic Dermatology** (12 posts) — derm-specific search terms
5. **Aesthetic & Skincare Clinics** (10 posts) — broader aesthetic clinic terms
6. **Botox / Fillers / Injectables** (10 posts) — treatment-specific high-intent
7. **Laser, Body Contouring, & Specialty Clinics** (10 posts) — niche treatment terms
8. **Plastic & Cosmetic Surgery** (8 posts) — surgical clinic marketing
9. **Local SEO, Reviews & Google Business** (7 posts) — local search authority

---

## Refilling the Queue

When `/blog/_queue/` is running low, ask Claude:
> "Refill the blog queue with the next 10 posts from the calendar."

Claude will pull the next unpublished topics in numerical order, write each one as a full HTML file in `/blog/_queue/`, and the GitHub Action will pick them up automatically on the next scheduled run.
